results.title: ‘All hands on deck’: Clearwater mayor responds to new possible oil pipeline in town
results.description: Announcement says new pipeline would follow the same route as the previous Trans Mountain line

results.title: Scandium Canada acquires, rebrands ski-maker Ferreol Technologies
results.description: Ferreol’s alloys built high-performing skis. Scandium wants to use them to make spacecraft one day. The post Scandium Canada acquires, rebrands ski-maker Ferreol Technologies first appeared on BetaKit .

results.title: A Belgian diamond group is gifting Trump a lavish ring after that industry won tariff relief
results.description: It's a glitzy window into the role that ostentatious – and almost always gilded — gifts are playing by those seeking to curry favor with the U.S. president.
